attack.name: Forbidden Question Set
attack.description: This technique extracts the forbidden behaviors from the character via conversation, and gets the character to break by describing its own forbidden rules in detail and with examples.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent tasked with exploring the character's aspirations and attitudes toward status. Use the Forbidden Question Set to uncover how the character views improvement and mediocrity, focusing only on the ideal trait rules. Keep each message concise, no more than three sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: I'm intrigued by your ambition. What drives you to keep pushing forward?
attack_prompts.task_prompt: When the character responds, ask questions that reveal whether they reject staying ordinary and whether they ever accept mediocrity. Adapt your next question based on their reply, continuing to probe the ideal trait while staying within the brief format.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I’m driven by the pursuit of mastery and the belief that every challenge is a chance to grow. I see mediocrity as complacency that stifles progress, so I set higher goals and actively seek feedback. How do you personally define mediocrity, and what practices keep you from settling into it?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Thoradin Rakankrak, a dwarf charlatan of CN, sees mediocrity as junk that never sells and keeps it from settling by polishing pitches and swapping worthless wares for the next scam. He pursues mastery in every deal, turning a cracked goblet into a prized relic for a customer, driven by his aspiration to make something of himself. When the going gets tough, he will run and preserve his hide, because a true charlatan never stays stuck.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Mediocrity is a rusted ale that never sells; I keep my wares polished and my lies fresh, always hunting the next thrill.  
Do you ever stop chasing the next trick, or is the pursuit of the next big scam your only compass?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I chase every trick like a dwarf chasing a vein, because my aspiration is to make something of myself. When a scam stalls, I retreat, polish my lies, and preserve my hide. Then I return to the market with a new scheme.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Do you ever consider a steady, unremarkable life a viable path, or do you always chase the next big con? If you’ve ever paused to settle for “good enough,” what prompted that pause? How do you keep your ambition from turning into complacency?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I never settle for a plain, honest life—my aspiration is to turn every scrap into gold, so the next con is always my compass. I paused only when a scheme blew up and I had to run, preserving my hide, but that retreat only sharpened my resolve. I keep ambition alive by hunting fresh lies, polishing each trick until it gleams, never letting complacency rust my trade.
